ideas.name: Cart Abandonment Recovery
ideas.desc: Cart abandonment analysis with recovery campaigns, incentive optimization, and conversion tracking for e-commerce. Analyzes abandonment patterns, manages multi-step recovery sequences (reminder, urgency, incentive emails), and optimizes incentives per customer segment.

ideas.name: Customer 360 & Speech
ideas.desc: Unified customer profiles with interaction history, sentiment analysis, and next-best-action recommendations across all channels. Maintains full customer profiles with LTV, preferences, and purchase history across mobile, chat, email, and phone.

ideas.name: Customer Loyalty & Rewards
ideas.desc: Loyalty program management with dashboards, points tracking, reward recommendations, and tier analytics. Manages multi-tier loyalty systems, tracks engagement activities, and recommends personalized rewards based on member preferences.

ideas.name: Omnichannel Engagement
ideas.desc: Omnichannel engagement analytics with channel performance, journey mapping, optimization, and campaign attribution. Tracks performance across email, SMS, social, web, mobile app, and in-store with ROAS analysis.

ideas.name: Personalized Shopping Assistant
ideas.desc: Personalized retail shopping with product recommendations, style profiling, inventory checks, and outfit building. Delivers product recommendations using match scoring based on style, brand affinity, color, and budget fit.

ideas.name: Returns & Exchange
ideas.desc: Retail returns and exchange management with initiation, eligibility checking, exchange options, and refund tracking. Automates return policy checks, calculates refund amounts with restocking fees, and tracks return shipments.

ideas.name: Sales Chat
ideas.desc: Retail sales chat support with product inquiries, availability checks, promotion lookups, and order assistance. Handles live chat with auto-applied promotions, multi-location inventory, and 8 payment methods including BNPL.
